title: Add AI video generator to Creative
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Action! The hive makes movies
gist.blurb: A brand new AI video generator just dropped in the community showcase. Grab your director's chair and start generating videos using the free seedance model!
gist.summary: A new community-built AI video generator utilizing the seedance model has been added to the Creative app showcase.
gist.impact: Creators now have a dedicated, easy-to-use interface for generating AI videos directly from the community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a movie director, holding a clapperboard or operating a retro camera. The Monitor Robot acts as the playback screen, showing a generated video. Represents the new AI video generator app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret and holding a clapperboard, standing next to a chunky Monitor Robot whose screen displays a beautiful pixel landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
